tasks.label: kill-port-3020
tasks.command: $pids = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3020 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; foreach ($pid in $pids) { Stop-Process -Id $pid -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; if ($pids) { Write-Output "Killed: $($pids -join ', ')" } else { Write-Output "No listener on 3020" }

tasks.label: list-node-procs
tasks.command: Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "name='node.exe'" | Select-Object ProcessId, CommandLine | Format-List

tasks.label: list-node-procs-2
tasks.command: Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -eq 'node.exe' } | Select-Object ProcessId, CommandLine | Format-List

tasks.label: kill-node-lockers
tasks.command: $targets = @(36592,2148,14676); foreach ($procId in $targets) { if (Get-Process -Id $procId -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { Stop-Process -Id $procId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "Stopped $procId" } }; Write-Output "Done"

tasks.label: assessment-qa-summary-3025
tasks.command: $report = Get-Content 'output/playwright/assessment-actions-auth/2026-04-07T12-21-18-727Z/assessment-actions-auth-qa-report.json' -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $rows = foreach ($c in $report.combinations) { $groupOverflow = @($c.toolbarMetrics.groups | Where-Object { $_.overflow -eq $true }).Count -gt 0; $pass = $c.isExpectedRoute -and (-not $c.horizontalOverflow) -and $c.toolbarMetrics.present -and (-not $c.toolbarMetrics.overflow) -and (-not $groupOverflow); [PSCustomObject]@{ route=$c.routeLabel; theme=$c.theme; viewport=$c.viewport.name; pass=$pass } }; $rows | Sort-Object route, theme, viewport | Format-Table -AutoSize

tasks.label: fix-eperm-remove-agent-base
tasks.command: $target='apps/web/node_modules/agent-base'; if (Test-Path $target) { attrib -R "$target\*" /S /D 2>$null; try { Remove-Item $target -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "Removed $target" } catch { Write-Output "REMOVE_FAILED: $($_.Exception.Message)"; exit 1 } } else { Write-Output "Target missing" }

tasks.label: kill-stale-next-build-procs
tasks.command: $buildProcs = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -eq 'node.exe' -and $_.CommandLine -match 'zootopia-club-next' -and ($_.CommandLine -match 'run build' -or $_.CommandLine -match 'next\\dist\\bin\\next" build' -or $_.CommandLine -match '\\.next\\build\\postcss\\.js') }; if ($buildProcs) { foreach ($proc in $buildProcs) { Stop-Process -Id $proc.ProcessId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "Stopped build process $($proc.ProcessId)" } } else { Write-Output 'No matching build processes found' }

tasks.label: web-build-mem-cpu-check
tasks.command: npm run build --workspace @zootopia/web; Write-Output ("BUILD_EXIT_CODE=$LASTEXITCODE"); if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }
